from sqlalchemy.orm import Session, selectinload
from sqlalchemy import select
from models import Author, Book


def get_authors_with_books(session: Session) -> list[dict]:
    authors = session.query(Author).all()
    result = []
    for author in authors:
        books = [{"id": b.id, "title": b.title} for b in author.books]
        result.append({"id": author.id, "name": author.name, "books": books})
    return result


def get_publishers_with_authors(session: Session) -> list[dict]:
    from models import Publisher
    publishers = session.query(Publisher).all()
    result = []
    for publisher in publishers:
        authors = []
        for book in publisher.books:
            authors.append({"id": book.author.id, "name": book.author.name})
        result.append({"id": publisher.id, "authors": authors})
    return result


def get_book_details(session: Session, book_id: int) -> dict:
    book = session.get(Book, book_id)
    return {
        "id": book.id,
        "title": book.title,
        "author_name": book.author.name,
        "publisher_name": book.publisher.name,
    }
